series_metadata.series_description: Tracking reports detail requests for labor market information via telephone, fax and written format and the responses to those inquiries. Reports list the number of requests, the requester, subject matter and response. Inquiries come from the public, government, private sector and educational institutions requesting census data, and LMI publications covering a variety of information, e.g. unemployment rates, industry and occupational employment projections, leading indicators, and market analysis of workforce trends.
